data.reasoningText: The user wants to run their .NET tests with `dotnet test` and generate a TRX report. Let me invoke the run-tests skill which is designed for this purpose.

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-b0a4a79603c54a4d9fceb82e1e7404f3 && dotnet test --logger \"trx;LogFileName=TestResults.trx\" 2>&1", "description": "Run dotnet test with TRX logger", "initial_wait": 60}
